statement.informal: Conditional statement of the SuperBEST division lower bound at 3 nodes (the full general-domain claim). The exp-type outer cases (F13/F14/F15/F16) are Lean-proved via `no_exp_outer_2node_div`. The remaining 3072 circuits (F1–F12 outer) are certified by an exhaustive Python search and the Lean case analysis is deferred — encoded here as a `True` placeholder accepting an external hypothesis. **Honest framing**: this is a propositional scaffold awaiting Lean Pass-2 closure, not a closed theorem. (over ℂ instead of ℝ)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem SB_div_ge_three_full (g h : ℂ → ℂ → ℂ)
    (_houter : ∀ op ∈ d_f16_ops, ¬ (∀ x y : ℂ, op (g x y) (h x y) = x / y)) :
    True

tactics:
theorem SB_div_ge_three_full (g h : ℂ → ℂ → ℂ)
    (_houter : ∀ op ∈ d_f16_ops, ¬ (∀ x y : ℂ, op (g x y) (h x y) = x / y)) :
    True := by
  trivial

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
